message:
fix(huh): MultiSelect cursor position mismatch with filtering (bd-17p2)

- Add `filterable()` builder method to enable filter mode
- Add `update_filter()` method with cursor adjustment logic:
  - Tracks current item's original index before filter change
  - Repositions cursor to same item if still visible
  - Clamps cursor to valid bounds if item filtered out
- Add `adjust_offset()` helper to keep cursor in viewport
- Modify update() to handle filter input (Escape clears, Backspace removes)
- Modify view() to display filter input when active
- Add 4 tests: cursor-stays, cursor-clamps, filter-toggle, nav-bounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
